mapper.sql: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.article_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.like_count, c.status, c.create_time, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id
mapper.select: WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.status = '0' AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comment (user_id, article_id, content, parent_id, like_count, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{likeCount}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM community_comment WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = '0' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comment SET like_count = like_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id}
